parsed.availability_comment: Auctioned to CSK for IPL 2026 and no fresh injury/unavailability report found in recent checks.
parsed.availability_note: No March 2026 report found ruling him out; prior shoulder issue was in March 2025 and later than current audit window.
parsed.followup_reason: Need pre-match CSK XI/training evidence close to March 30, 2026 to separate Henry from Ellis/Overton in the overseas pecking order.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Seam-bowling overseas slot is crowded, especially with Ellis and Overton also covering pace roles.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for one of four overseas spots in a squad that already has Noor Ahmad, Nathan Ellis, Jamie Overton, Akeal Hosein, Matthew Short and Zak Foulkes.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: CSK squad lists multiple overseas bowling options; Henry looks like a seam-rotation pick rather than a locked starter.
